de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class SimultaneousJavaASTVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.SimultaneousJavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.SimultaneousJavaASTVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SimultaneousVisitor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProgramVariablesMatchVisitor

    public abstract class SimultaneousJavaASTVisitor
extends SimultaneousJavaASTWalker
implements SimultaneousVisitor
    Extends the JavaASTWalker to use the visitor mechanism. The methods inherited by the Visitor interface are all implemented that they call the method doDefaultAction(ProgramElement) . TODO: Document (also, if sensible, containing methods!).
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected Services services

      protected void walk(ProgramElement node1, ProgramElement node2)
      Walks through the ASTs simultaneously, while keeping track of the current nodes.

      • Methods inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.SimultaneousJavaASTWalker

    • Method Detail

      • walk

        protected void walk(ProgramElement node1,
        ProgramElement node2)
        Description copied from class: SimultaneousJavaASTWalker
        Walks through the ASTs simultaneously, while keeping track of the current nodes.
        Overrides:
        walk in class SimultaneousJavaASTWalker
        Parameters:
        node1 - The first JavaProgramElement the walker is at.
        node2 - The second JavaProgramElement the walker is at.

      • doAction

        protected void doAction(ProgramElement node1,
            ProgramElement node2)
        The action that is performed just before leaving the node the last time.
        Specified by:
        doAction in class SimultaneousJavaASTWalker
        Parameters:
        node1 - First node.
        node2 - Second node.
